prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene; Renji Dawnblade, a masculine hero in a crimson guild cloak, and Mika Emberlane, an androgynous scout in a cropped travel jacket, stand at a wooden quest table. Renji unfolds a large, weathered quest map and gestures for Mika to assist, pinning the corners down with his broadsword hilt. Cinematic lighting, high-detail anime aesthetic, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Mika Emberlane leans in, placing a finger on the map to trace a route while pulling out a brass scout's compass to verify the direction. Renji nods in agreement, both characters working in sync to finalize their quest plan. Consistent character appearance and camera angle, no text, no watermark.
